description: The LegacyWorldListManager component is used in the old dash to manage the world list before the WorldsDataFeed component was implemented.

fields.UpdatingUser: The user handling this component's update logic.
fields.WorldItemTemplate: The item Component to use as a template when making the world list.
fields.WorldItemType: The C# Type of the world items. Auto filled.
fields.ShowOpenedWorlds: Show world's that are currently open.
fields.ShowPublishedWorlds: Show worlds that are currently published.
fields.MergeSessionsByWorldId: group sessions by world they were opened from.
fields.IdleSortDelay: How long to wait before sorting session list while idle.
fields.InteractingSortDelay: How long to wait before sorting session list while still interacting.
fields.SearchTerm: The current search term for worlds.
fields.SubmittedTo: The universe owner ID to search for worlds under (Usually G-Resonite)
fields.ByOwner: Show the worlds made by this user ID.
fields.OwnerType: The kind of entity that can own the world.
fields.MinDate: The minimum date for a world to show up in the results.
fields.MaxDate: The maximum date allowed for a world to show up in the results.
fields.MaxItems: The maximum amount of items to show.
fields.SkipItems: how many starter items to skip.
fields.EmptySessions: How to apply filters to empty sessions.
fields.IncompatibleSessions: Whether to show incompatible sessions due to game version number/plugins.
fields.OnlyHeadlessHosts: Whether to only Show headless worlds.
fields.MinimumTotalUsers: The minimum amount of users in order for it to show up in the list.
fields.MinimumTotalContacts: The maximum amount of users allowed for it to show up in the list.
fields.MinSessionAccessLevel: The minimum session access level allowed for an item to show up in the list.
fields.MaxSessionAccessLevel: The maximum session access level allowed for an item to show up in the list.
fields.MinUptime: The minimum session access time allowed for an item to show up in the list.
fields.MaxUptime: The maximum session access time allowed for an item in the list.
fields.ParentSessionId: The ID of the session for the user login.
fields.Visited: Whether worlds should be shown if they are either visited or not visited.
fields.SortProperties: A list of sorting rules for the list of displayed items.
fields.IsSearching: Whether the component is currently doing a search.
fields.HasMoreResults: Whether there is more results on other pages.
fields.FilteredResults: How many results appeared after filtering.

methods.OnItemHover: Handles when an item is hovered over in the list.

usage: This is a Legacy component. Don't use.
